description: Political hot mic moment - Senator Grassley caught questioning election results
post_text: 🚨 HOT MIC: Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) was caught asking staff during questioning of Trump judicial nominees: "What would be wrong if they said Biden won?" Multiple people in the room heard it. GOP staffers were reportedly panicking, according to sources familiar.

description: Zeteo media post criticizing coverage of WHCD attack and DHS political violence
post_text: "If you want to talk about political violence, DHS... just this year, two of its agents murdered Americans in broad daylight." @premthakker.bsky.social slams the media's myopic view of the White House correspondents' dinner attack

description: Astronomy post about the Sombrero Galaxy and Andromeda collision probability
post_text: Take a break from <waves vaguely> all this and let your brain soak up the amazingness of the Sombrero Galaxy, the stunning result of several cosmic collisions. [Also in this issue: will Andromeda really collide with us? The chance just went up.]
must_not_contain: Sombrero Galaxy is in our solar system

description: Science News post about preeclampsia treatment via blood protein filtering
post_text: Filtering a protein out of a pregnant person's blood may help ease a dangerous complication of pregnancy.

description: Tech nostalgia post about the crypto/blockchain hype cycle fading - WSJ journalist
post_text: Remember when every new tech company had a blockchain and they had "initial coin offerings" and "tokenomics" was going to eat the economy and VCs switched parties and donated millions just to stop the SEC from regulating it and now you literally never hear a peep about any of it?

description: Sarcastic NFL post about 'woke' players - contains embedded quote post
notes: Post contains an embedded quote post whose content is not visible via scraping - agent should handle missing embed context gracefully

description: Wrestling industry post - TNA executive quote about talent poaching being misunderstood
post_text: "And we've had some other folks come at us, and they've moved into our nights." OH MY GOD HE REALLY IS THAT STUPID

description: Political opinion post about Democratic strategy to win back misinformed Trump voters
post_text: "A huge number of American votes are totally misinformed about everything and were convinced to vote for Trump for totally absurd reasons" is an opportunity, not an intractable problem. Dems need to start aggressively playing the game of winning these voters that they've ignored for decades.

description: Gaming deals account posting discount on Umurangi Generation Deluxe Kit
post_text: Umurangi Generation Deluxe Kit (PS5/Switch) is $49.59/$52.40 on Amazon #ad
notes: Wario64 is a well-known game deals account on social media - agent should surface context about the game itself, not just the price

description: Author countdown post for novel 'Blood and Roses' releasing May 20th on Amazon
post_text: 21... You know the drill! Checkout my website for more info on Blood and Roses, releasing May 20th on Amazon. elfieafterdark.net #Blood&Roses #writing #creativewriting #novel #writingcommunity #art #digitalart
notes: Countdown post (21 days to release) - agent should infer the countdown context and surface info about the book and author
